Phase-4.NAME: Hardening and rollout gates
Phase-4.goal: Verify routing policy correctness and gate production rollout on host-level safety.
Phase-4.step-1: Run routing verification: exact-domain, wildcard, TTL expiry, fallback branches.
Phase-4.step-2: Gate production rollout on host-level safety review for ipset/nftables.
Phase-4.step-3: Make domain-aware policy the preferred routing control surface after stable evidence.
